case_title: ALLSTATE FIRE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. TERRY RANDALL II ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-22-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE FIRE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY A/S/O ANDREW HORTON AS TO DEFENDANT RANDALL II, TERRY BAMA TITLING LIMITED LSR DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-22-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-29-2019
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-22-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-03-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-03-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-22-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST BRUCE MAO, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-13-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-27-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-13-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100050652)
